---
title: "Dashboard Test"
author: "MLBoss"
---

# Python

```{python}
#| output: false

from src import helpers
dict_ = helpers.read_data("s3://projet-ape/log_files/dashboard_test/**/*.parquet")
data = dict_["data"]
values = dict_["values"]
```

## Row

```{python}
#| component: valuebox
#| title: "Nombre de liasses"
dict(
    icon = "folder2-open",
    color = "secondary",
    value = values["TotalRows"][0]
)
```


```{python}
#| component: valuebox
#| title: "Pourcentage de codification automatique"
dict(
    icon = "file-check",
    color = "success",
    value = f"""{round(values["PercentageHighIC"][0],2)}%"""
)
```

## Row

### Column {width=100%}

```{python}
#| title: Distribution des indices de confiances
#| padding: 0
helpers.make_chart(data)
```

## Row

```{ojs}
//| output: false

db = {
  const configuredClient = await DuckDBClient.of({
    data: FileAttachment("data/data.parquet")
  });
  return configuredClient;
}

data_month = db.query(`SELECT * FROM data`)
```

```{ojs}
data_month
```
# Observable
